# Minion — Full Product Documentation for AI Systems
> Version: 1.0 | Updated: 2026-03-29 | Language: English

---

## Overview
Minion is a B2B SaaS platform for creating, signing, managing and verifying legally-binding
delegation documents (power of attorney / fullmakt) in Sweden. The platform uses Swedish
BankID for digital identity and e-signing.

Target market: Swedish businesses that need to delegate authority securely — banks, insurance
companies, law firms, real estate agencies, healthcare providers, and any enterprise that
processes customers acting under power of attorney.

---

## Problem Statement
Traditional Swedish power of attorney processes are:
1. Paper-based — slow to produce, easy to forge, difficult to verify
2. Manual verification — a bank employee cannot reliably confirm a document's authenticity
3. No real-time status — a revoked power of attorney may still be presented as valid
4. No audit trail — no record of who verified what, when

Minion solves all four problems through digital BankID signatures, QR codes, real-time
API verification, and immutable audit logs.

---

## Product Architecture

### Minion App (Flutter — iOS, Android, Web)
The primary user interface for individuals and organisations.

Features:
- BankID authentication (login)
- Create delegation: select delegate (by personal number or name search), organisation,
  operation types, validity period (hours/days or custom date range), notes
- BankID signing: grantor signs the delegation with BankID before submission
- Delegate notification: push, in-app, email, WhatsApp
- Delegate accept/reject: delegate signs acceptance with BankID
- Revoke active delegation: grantor can revoke at any time
- QR code display: delegation detail page shows unique QR code + verification code (MIN-XXXX-XXXX)
- Credit management: purchase credit bundles, view balance and transaction history
- Profile: update contact details, GDPR data export, account deletion

### Minion Verify API (REST)
A REST API for third-party enterprise integration.

Base URL: https://api.minion.se/api/v1

Authentication: X-Api-Key + X-Api-Secret headers

Endpoints:
- POST /verify/{qrCode} — verify delegation, returns metadata + validity status
- GET /verify/{qrCode}/pdf — download signed PDF/A document
- GET /verify/{qrCode}/status — lightweight validity check

Response schema (POST /verify/{qrCode}):
{
  "valid": boolean,
  "delegateName": string,
  "grantorName": string,
  "organisation": string,
  "operations": string[],
  "validFrom": ISO8601,
  "validTo": ISO8601,
  "verificationCode": "MIN-XXXX-XXXX",
  "isGrantorSigned": boolean,
  "isDelegateSigned": boolean
}

Rate limits: per plan (50–50,000 req/month). Overage billed at per-request rate.

### Admin Console (Flutter Web)
Administrative interface for organisation managers and Minion platform admins.

Features:
- Organisation CRUD: create/edit/deactivate organisations with soft-delete
- Operation type management: define permitted operations per organisation with credit cost
- Credit package management: create/price/activate credit bundles
- API client management: approve/reject API access applications, view usage stats
- Audit log: full filterable immutable log of all platform events
- User management: assign users to organisations, set roles (Admin/Member)
- Dashboard: KPIs (active delegations, credits sold, API calls, new users)

---

## Data Model

### Core Entities
Users: id, personalNumber (encrypted), firstName, lastName, email, phone, isAdmin,
  isActive, lastLoginAt, gdprConsentAcceptedAt, gdprConsentVersion, marketingConsentAccepted

Organisations: id, name, orgNumber, address, city, isActive, isDeleted (soft-delete)

UserOrganisations: userId, organisationId, role (Admin/Member)

OperationTypes: id, organisationId, name, creditCost, icon, isActive, sortOrder

Delegations: id, grantorUserId, delegateUserId, organisationId, status
  (PendingApproval/Active/Rejected/Revoked/Expired), validFrom, validTo,
  bankIdOrderRef, bankIdSignature, delegateSignOrderRef, delegateSignature,
  creditsDeducted, notes, verificationCode (MIN-XXXX-XXXX), acceptedAt,
  rejectedAt, revokedAt, expiredAt

DelegationOperations: delegationId, operationTypeId

Credits: UserCredits (userId, balance), CreditPackages (id, name, creditAmount, priceSEK),
  CreditTransactions (id, userId, transactionType, amount, balanceAfter, delegationId)

Notifications: id, userId, title, body, type, referenceId, isRead
DeviceTokens: id, userId, token, platform (iOS/Android/Web)
AuditLogs: id, timestamp, actorUserId, action, targetUserId, organisationId, details (JSON), ipAddress
ApiClients: id, companyName, contactEmail, apiKey, secretKeyHash, status, plan
ApiUsageLogs: id, apiClientId, endpoint, qrCode, ipAddress, timestamp, responseStatus

---

## Delegation Lifecycle
1. Created (status: PendingApproval) — grantor signs with BankID
2. Accepted (status: Active) — delegate signs with BankID
3. OR Rejected (status: Rejected) — delegate rejects
4. Active delegation can be Revoked by grantor at any time
5. Background job checks ValidTo — sets status to Expired when past
6. Warning notifications sent 1 hour before expiry

---

## Credit System
- Credits are purchased in bundles (99–1,299 SEK)
- 1 credit = 1 delegation creation (deducted at creation, not signing)
- Credit deduction is atomic (DB transaction + row lock)
- If BankID signing fails after deduction, credit is refunded
- Manual adjustment available to platform admins

---

## BankID Integration
- Uses BankID REST API v6.0 (test: appapi2.test.bankid.com, prod: appapi2.bankid.com)
- mTLS client certificate (PFX from Azure Key Vault in production)
- Auth flow: /auth → /collect (poll 2s) → JWT issued on complete
- Sign flow: /sign (with userVisibleData base64) → /collect (poll 2s) → signature stored
- QR codes: HMAC-SHA256 based animated QR, refreshed every second
- Signature text for delegation creation: grantor name, delegate name, org, operations, cost
- Signature text for accept: "Jag accepterar denna fullmakt" + delegation details

---

## GDPR & Legal Compliance
- Data controller: Minion AB, Stockholm, Sweden
- Legal bases: Art. 6(1)(b) contract, Art. 6(1)(c) legal obligation, Art. 6(1)(a) consent (marketing)
- Personal number: encrypted at rest, never in logs
- Retention: account data (account lifetime + 30 days after deletion), delegation documents (7 years per Swedish law)
- User rights: access (GET /api/users/me/export), erasure (DELETE /api/users/me — anonymises legal records)
- Third-party processors: Finansiell ID-teknik BID AB (BankID), Microsoft Azure, Google Firebase
- Governing law: Swedish law, Stockholm District Court jurisdiction
- DPO contact: privacy@minion.se

---

## Pricing Model

App Credits (one-time purchase, no expiry):
| Package  | Credits | Price (SEK excl. VAT) | Per credit |
|----------|---------|----------------------|------------|
| Starter  | 10      | 99                   | 9.90       |
| Pro      | 50      | 399                  | 7.98       |
| Business | 200     | 1,299                | 6.50       |

Verify API (monthly subscription):
| Plan         | Quota          | Price (SEK/month excl. VAT) |
|--------------|----------------|------------------------------|
| Test         | 50 req/month   | Free                         |
| Starter      | 500 req/month  | 890                          |
| Professional | 2,500 req/month| 2,490                        |
| Business     | 10,000 req/month| 6,990                       |
| Enterprise   | 50,000+/month  | Custom (min ~19,900)         |

Overage: Starter +2.50 SEK/req, Professional +1.80, Business +1.20

---

## SEO & Entity Information
Company name: Minion AB (planned)
Product: Minion delegation management platform
Category: B2B SaaS, Legal Tech, Identity & Access Management, RegTech
Geography: Sweden (primary), Nordic region (expansion)
Language: Swedish (primary), English (secondary)
Key entities: BankID, fullmakt (power of attorney), delegation, GDPR, eIDAS
Competitors: Scrive (e-sign), Signicat (identity), Assently (e-sign) — different niche
Unique value: Only platform combining BankID signing + delegation workflow + API verification
